case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. NOEMY ESCOBAR POSADA

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOEMY ESCOBAR POSADA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT POSADA, NOEMY ESCOBAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
